scoring_basis: Re-score docs/experiments/02-vision-audit-pilot/runs/raw-predictions-v5.jsonl predictions against docs/experiments/05-defects-skill/labeled-defects.json refined v1 taxonomy, restricted to the 4 holdout panels.
model_prediction_source: Claude Code sub-agents loading panel + face cards + rubric_v5.md via Read tool — same as Exp 02's v5 run.
honesty_caveat: Same as v3 — the v5 rubric was tuned on the full 20-panel set including these 4 holdout panels. This is a re-scoring of previously-tuned predictions against a refined taxonomy, not a clean cross-validated held-out test.
rubric_used_for_scoring: detection-rubric-v1.md taxonomy, forward-mapped from rubric_v5.md outputs.

outcome_per_labeled_defect.reason: v5 predicted character_count_error: false confidence: high — missed

v5 flagged nothing at MED+HIGH on this GOOD panel (per holdout-set re-inspection of raw-predictions-v5.jsonl). Note: Exp 02 reported a hair FP for v5 on p05-03 — not on p06-03 which is in this holdout.
v5 has no sequence-level category and was not given prior_panel_image
